channel.title: Blog on Rukshan's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Rukshan's Blog

item.title: Medium and Google is not a good combination
item.description: I know this is going to sound just like another complaint against Google, but I want my Google results to be better.

item.title: Don't buy a .icu domain
item.description: The new .icu and .cyou domains targeting the new generation, which is a hip way to say ‘I see you’, or ‘see you’.
